text:
require(
  action == ActionType.Cancel ||
  action == ActionType.SetUserSigningKey ||
  action == ActionType.DAIWithdrawal ||
  action == ActionType.USDCWithdrawal ||
  action == ActionType.ETHWithdrawal ||
  action == ActionType.SetEscapeHatch ||
  action == ActionType.RemoveEscapeHatch ||
  action == ActionType.DisableEscapeHatch,
  "Invalid custom action type."
);

return
            keccak256(
                abi.encodePacked(
                    redeem_.token,
                    redeem_.amount,
                    redeem_.receiver,
                    redeem_.batch,
                    redeem_.operationType,
                    redeem_.nonce,
                    network_,
                    address(bridge_)
                )
            );

assembly {
    result := mload(0x40) // Grab the free memory pointer.
    // Layout the variables and bytecode backwards.
    mstore(add(result, 0xa3), tokenId_)
    mstore(add(result, 0x83), shr(96, shl(96, tokenContract_)))
    mstore(add(result, 0x63), chainId_)
    mstore(add(result, 0x43), salt_)
    mstore(add(result, 0x23), 0x5af43d82803e903d91602b57fd5bf3)
    mstore(add(result, 0x14), implementation_)
    mstore(result, 0x3d60ad80600a3d3981f3363d3d373d3d3d363d73)
    result := keccak256(add(result, 0x0c), 0xb7)
}

assembly {
    let m := mload(0x40) // Cache the free memory pointer.
    mstore(0x00, hash)
    mstore(0x20, add(shr(255, vs), 27)) // `v`.
    mstore(0x40, r)
    mstore(0x60, shr(1, shl(1, vs))) // `s`.
    pop(staticcall(gas(), 1, 0x00, 0x80, 0x40, 0x20))
    mstore(0x60, 0) // Restore the zero slot.
    // `returndatasize()` will be `0x20` upon success, and `0x00` otherwise.
    result := mload(xor(0x60, returndatasize()))
    mstore(0x40, m) // Restore the free memory pointer.
}
